<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Retrieve a Transaction's Operations"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/transactions/{transaction_hash}/operations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This endpoint returns Successful operations for a specific transaction.
